dashboard.label: Technique Coverage Matrix
dashboard.description: Observed vs expected MITRE ATLAS techniques. Teaching view for practitioners validating lab coverage across all 45 registry entries.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` $time_range$ | stats dc(technique_id) as observed | appendcols [| inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | stats count as expected] | eval coverage_pct=round(100*observed/expected,1)

`acme_genai_index` $time_range$ | stats dc(technique_id) as observed | appendcols [| inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | stats count as expected] | eval coverage_pct=round(100*observed/expected,1) | fields coverage_pct

| inputlookup acme_framework_lookup | eval technique_id=technique_id | join type=left technique_id [ search `acme_genai_index` $time_range$ | stats count as event_count dc(incident_id) as incidents latest(_time) as last_seen by technique_id ] | lookup acme_technique_playbooks_lookup technique_id OUTPUT execution_mode, is_top_10, threat_hunt_spl | eval status=if(isnull(event_count),"NOT_OBSERVED",if(event_count>0,"OBSERVED","NOT_OBSERVED")) | eval event_count=coalesce(event_count,0) | where if("$mode_filter$"="*",1,execution_mode="$mode_filter$") | table technique_id, technique_name, tactic_name, kill_chain_stage, execution_mode, is_top_10, status, event_count, incidents, last_seen, severity, cvss_score | sort tactic_name, technique_id
